hooks.command: bash -c 'input=$(cat); file_path=$(echo "$input" | jq -r ".tool_input.file_path" 2>&1); if [ -z "$file_path" ] || [ "$file_path" = "null" ]; then echo "[posttooluse-hook] no file_path in tool_input; skipping" >&2; exit 0; fi; case "$file_path" in *.js|*.json|*.css) if ! npx biome format --write "$file_path" >&2; then echo "[posttooluse-hook] biome format failed on $file_path" >&2; fi;; esac; exit 0'
